title: Bratwurst Paella
description: A twist on traditional paella with German bratwurst sausage for a hearty and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the bacon and cook until crispy, then remove from the pan.
Add the bratwurst sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chorizo and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, rice, salt, pepper, and paprika to the pan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy bacon and diced sausage.
